tagline: Individual series labels: You can now enable labels for individual series, instead of all series on the dashboard at once.
what_it_does: Individual series labels: You can now enable labels for individual series, instead of all series on the dashboard at once. Fixed download format options: Resolved an issue where dashboard downloads only showed PNG format instead of multiple file formats (CSV, TSV, and Excel).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Individual series labels: You can now enable labels for individual series, instead of all series on the dashboard at once. Fixed download format options: Resolved an issue where dashboard downloads only showed PNG format instead of multiple file formats…
key_takeaway: Individual series labels: You can now enable labels for individual series, instead of all series on the dashboard at once.
